meaning: n.举行就职典礼者,开创者
examples: So we can conclude that Sima Qian is the inaugurator of Chinese Fu study.
The inaugurator was a young pastor, Karl Barth (1886-1968), who had gone there in 1911, at the age of 25.
Knight is inaugurator of uncertainty theory, he explained the resource of profit, and defined the nature of firm on base of discretion between risk and uncertainty.
